patch.value: MCP built-in actions are not extension-aware: pm_profile/pm_list etc. don't activate extensions before running

cubic (PR #404) noted that MCP pm_profile lint (and show/apply) resolve only built-in profiles because runAction (src/mcp/server.ts) runs built-in native actions WITHOUT activating workspace extensions or setting the active registration registry — only the dynamic-extension-dispatch fallback (runDynamicExtensionAction) activates+sets registrations. So getActiveExtensionRegistrations() is empty for built-in actions, and extension-contributed profiles/item-types are invisible over MCP, while the CLI path (main.ts activates extensions for every command) IS extension-aware. This is a pre-existing, broad asymmetry affecting all built-in MCP actions that read extension registrations, not just profile. Fix: wrap built-in runAction dispatch in a load/activate/setActive.../teardown cycle (mirroring runDynamicExtensionActionExclusively) so MCP built-in actions see active extensions consistently with the CLI. Deferred from #404 (pm-j1fj); lint is consistent with show/apply today.
